feed.subtitle: The map is not the territory. The policy is not the problem. The frame is.
feed.title: Breaking the Frame

entry.content:
Hello, world!


Breaking the Frame is a writing space for short policy essays, conceptual notes, and reflective analysis on governance, technology, institutions, and public problems.


If you need to contact me, please leave a comment under any article or email AuroMaris@protonmail.com


The map is not the territory. The policy is not the problem. The frame is.
entry.summary:
Hello, world!


Breaking the Frame is a writing space for short policy essays, conceptual notes, and reflective analysis on go
entry.title: Hello World!
